attributes.action: Abolish grammar schools & reallocate funding to SEND in mainstream schools
attributes.additional_details: Require local authorities to abolish the 11 plus & integrate funding into mainstream education support, specifically the Government’s goal of providing core support for SEND within mainstream settings, ensuring more children can access multi-disciplinary services without needing lengthy statutory assessments. The government funding that we think is wasted on the 11 plus system can be used for other parts of the education system.
attributes.background: Abolish the 11 plus nationally. Require phase out of remaining state-funded selective grammar schools and prevent the creation of new ones. Focus on SEND support. Require local authorities to redirect resources from selective testing (11 plus) toward an inclusive, mainstream-first education system.
